member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.Compare(QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.CompareRequestDTO)
member.summary: Compare two quantities of the same type. No TargetUnit needed — result is Equal / Not Equal.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.Add(QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.AddRequestDTO)
member.summary: Add two quantities and return the result in the specified TargetUnit. Temperature is not supported.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.Subtract(QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.SubtractRequestDTO)
member.summary: Subtract QuantityTwo from QuantityOne and return the result in TargetUnit. Temperature is not supported.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.Divide(QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.DivideRequestDTO)
member.summary: Divide QuantityOne by QuantityTwo. Returns a dimensionless ratio. No TargetUnit needed. Temperature is not supported.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.Convert(QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.ConvertRequestDTO)
member.summary: Convert a quantity to a different unit within the same MeasurementType. Works for all types including Temperature.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.GetHistory
member.summary: Get full measurement history (all operations, all types).

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.GetHistoryByOperation(System.String)
member.summary: Filter history by operation type. Valid values: Compare | Add | Subtract | Divide | Convert

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.GetHistoryByType(System.String)
member.summary: Filter history by measurement type. Valid values: Length | Weight | Volume | Temperature

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.DeleteHistory
member.summary: Delete all history records.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.Controller.QuantityMeasurementAPIController.GetStats
member.summary: Get total record count and repository info.

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.QuantityRequest
member.summary: A single quantity: a numeric value + its unit + the measurement category.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.QuantityRequest.Value
member.summary: The numeric amount. Example: 1.5

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.QuantityRequest.Unit
member.summary: Unit for this value. Length: Feet | Inches | Yards | Centimeters Weight: Kilogram | Gram | Pound Volume: Litre | Millilitre | Gallon Temperature: Celsius | Fahrenheit | Kelvin

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.QuantityRequest.MeasurementType
member.summary: Category: Length | Weight | Volume | Temperature

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.CompareRequestDTO
member.summary: Compare two quantities of the same type. No TargetUnit needed — comparison is done in base units.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.CompareRequestDTO.QuantityOne
member.summary: First quantity to compare.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.CompareRequestDTO.QuantityTwo
member.summary: Second quantity to compare (must be the same MeasurementType as QuantityOne).

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.AddRequestDTO
member.summary: Add two quantities and express the result in TargetUnit. Temperature is not supported for arithmetic.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.AddRequestDTO.QuantityOne
member.summary: First quantity.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.AddRequestDTO.QuantityTwo
member.summary: Second quantity (must be the same MeasurementType as QuantityOne).

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.AddRequestDTO.TargetUnit
member.summary: Unit for the result. Must be a valid unit for the same MeasurementType. Example: "Inches", "Kilogram", "Litre"

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.SubtractRequestDTO
member.summary: Subtract QuantityTwo from QuantityOne and express the result in TargetUnit. Temperature is not supported for arithmetic.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.SubtractRequestDTO.QuantityOne
member.summary: First quantity (the minuend).

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.SubtractRequestDTO.QuantityTwo
member.summary: Second quantity (the subtrahend, same MeasurementType as QuantityOne).

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.SubtractRequestDTO.TargetUnit
member.summary: Unit for the result. Must be a valid unit for the same MeasurementType. Example: "Feet", "Gram", "Gallon"

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.DivideRequestDTO
member.summary: Divide QuantityOne by QuantityTwo. Returns a dimensionless ratio — no TargetUnit needed. Temperature is not supported for arithmetic.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.DivideRequestDTO.QuantityOne
member.summary: Dividend quantity.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.DivideRequestDTO.QuantityTwo
member.summary: Divisor quantity (must be the same MeasurementType as QuantityOne, non-zero).

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.ConvertRequestDTO
member.summary: Convert a single quantity to a different unit within the same MeasurementType. Works for all types including Temperature.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.ConvertRequestDTO.Source
member.summary: The quantity to convert.

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementApp.Api.DTOs.ConvertRequestDTO.TargetUnit
member.summary: The unit to convert into (must be in the same MeasurementType as Source). Example: "Fahrenheit", "Yards", "Kilogram"

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
